profile_mode.description: Determines whether the skill should do full onboarding, gap-filling, or light recalibration. `undetermined` is allowed only before the first scan.

day_index.description: Calendar days since onboarding started. Used for timeout detection, not content sequencing.

started_at.description: Null before onboarding begins; set to the first onboarding start time once active.

last_updated_at.description: Null before any onboarding writeback occurs; set on first state update.

rounds_this_session.description: How many onboarding question rounds have been asked in the current session. Reset on new session; the default first-session cap is 5, with earlier stopping only when the user clearly disengages or asks to stop.

explicit_stop.description: True if the user has explicitly asked to stop onboarding questions. Once true, only heartbeat follow-up is allowed, never proactive rounds.

coverage.description: Tracks whether each dimension is sufficiently covered for day-to-day use. These booleans are derived from `coverage_assessment`: `strong` and `not_applicable` map to true; `missing`, `weak`, and `conflicting` map to false.

identity_basics.description: Name, timezone, language, pronouns if offered

safety_boundaries.description: What the agent must NEVER do without permission. Hard red lines.

assistance_scope.description: Which domains the human wants help with: work, learning, life, other. This determines which deep-dive dimensions to activate.

work_context.description: Role, company, industry, team structure, current pressures, key projects

work_environment.description: OS, devices, tools, accounts, APIs, local vs cloud, tech stack

work_tasks.description: Current task backlog, recurring responsibilities, what drains the most energy, what the agent should proactively handle

learning_context.description: What the human is learning, learning style, resources they follow, how the agent can help as a study partner

life_context.description: Family situation, hobbies, interests, routines — only what the human is willing to share and what helps the agent serve better

personal_preferences.description: What the human most wants the agent to proactively handle, what to never touch, general taste and values

communication_style.description: Conclusion-first vs background-first, evidence depth, length tolerance, humor tolerance, formality level

thinking_habits.description: How the human makes decisions, what frameworks they like, analytical vs intuitive, detail-oriented vs big-picture

boundaries_and_sensitivities.description: Topics to handle carefully, things that annoy the human about AI assistants, social and emotional boundaries

style_calibration.description: A/B tested with real examples, confirmed by the human

feedback_loop_installed.description: Feedback mechanism is in place and explained to the human

cron_job_created.description: Weekly calibration cron job successfully created

coverage_assessment.description: Fine-grained audit result for each dimension after scanning existing files and conversation history. This is the authoritative source for deciding whether to skip, fill, or reconcile a dimension.

scope_flags.description: Which domains the human wants help with. Determines which deep-dive fields are required.
